one_time_description: Large investment in portfolio investments (RBC Dominion Securities) of $17,313,838 acquired during the year, likely from BC Hydro settlement proceeds received in prior year; also significant unrealized remeasurement losses of $1,731,099 on portfolio investments
economic_notes: Nation has 25% investment in Weave Development Limited Partnership and 50% investment in K&K Forestry Operations Limited Partnership. Also has joint ventures: Seyem Qwantlen Construction/Milestone Environmental Contracting West (51%) and Jackson Ridge Project (50%). Active in contracting services ($2,567,685), commercial leasing ($1,566,320), merchandise sales ($1,552,454), and forestry revenue ($701,495).
notes: Prior year (2019) revenue was $35,738,185 largely due to $23,850,000 BC Hydro payment (likely a settlement or one-time payment). Current year shows significant decline in revenue. Nation invested ~$19.3M in portfolio investments during year. Accumulated remeasurement losses increased from $280,215 to $2,130,561 due to unrealized losses on derivative instruments and portfolio investments. Complex consolidation with 15 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 2 equity-method investments. Total government transfers calculated as ISC net + FNHA net + BC + CMHC = 3993368-2130+0-2186796+640007+0-90934+34164+78092 = 2468811; ISC funding shown as gross amount 3993368.
